creator: diizzy@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 218915
Patch for cyanrip

Import cyanrip which is a fully featured CD ripping program that focuses on accuracy, have advanced features most rippers don't, no bloat and is cross-platform.

Compile and runtime tested on:
FreeBSD 13.0-CURRENT r366770 (aarch64)
FreeBSD 12.1-RELEASE-p9 r365364 (amd64)

Poudriere testport OK 12.1-RELEASE (amd64)
